values.name: Move Fast
values.description: Moving fast helps us build and learn faster. We value speed over perfection in most cases.
behavioral_signals: Bias for action over analysis paralysis
Comfortable making decisions with incomplete information
Ships iteratively rather than waiting for perfect
Learns from experiments and course-corrects quickly

values.name: Focus on Long-Term Impact
values.description: Focus on the most important problems. Be willing to make short-term sacrifices for long-term gains.
behavioral_signals: Prioritizes high-leverage work over easy wins
Kills projects that aren't working despite sunk cost
Thinks about second and third-order effects
Measures impact, not just output

values.name: Build Awesome Things
values.description: Build things that matter and that people love.
behavioral_signals: Cares deeply about product quality and user experience
Goes beyond minimum requirements
Seeks feedback to improve
Takes pride in craft

values.name: Live in the Future
values.description: Build for where things are going, not where they are.
behavioral_signals: Stays current with technology trends
Proposes forward-looking solutions
Anticipates future requirements in design
Experiments with emerging technologies

values.name: Be Direct and Respect Your Colleagues
values.description: Be straightforward and honest with feedback. Respect others even in disagreement.
behavioral_signals: Gives candid feedback directly, not behind someone's back
Receives criticism gracefully and acts on it
Disagrees respectfully with clear reasoning
Creates psychological safety for others to speak up

values.name: Meta, Pair, Me
values.description: Prioritize what's best for Meta, then your team, then yourself.
behavioral_signals: Makes decisions that benefit the company even at personal cost
Collaborates across teams rather than optimizing locally
Shares knowledge and resources
Puts team success above personal recognition
